portal.title: RAHJ AI
portal.subtitle: Your ERP assistant portal — guidance and answers tailored to this system.
portal.chat_subheading: Same thread continues in the side panel if you open it from here or elsewhere.
portal.reply_pending: RAHJ AI is preparing a response...
portal.composer_hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
portal.suggestion_reports: How do I open inventory reports?
portal.suggestion_navigation: Where do I add a supplier or customer?
portal.suggestion_capabilities: What can RAHJ AI help with?
portal.suggestion_po_snapshot: Show PR / PO / GRN status snapshot for my company
portal.suggestion_po_list: Where is the purchase order list (pending / open POs)?
portal.suggestion_grn: How do I create or find goods receipt (GRN)?
portal.suggestion_journal_draft: Open journal voucher create with a draft prefill
portal.card_what_body: A dedicated space for help with forms, reports, and workflows. Step-by-step guidance will connect here in a later phase.
portal.card_privacy_body: When live features are enabled, answers will respect your company, location, and permissions — same as the rest of the ERP.
portal.empty_hint: Guidance and smart replies will appear here once the assistant is connected.
portal.all_chats_aria: Replace the assistant with the list of saved chats
portal.chat_list_subheading: Select a chat to open it in the assistant. Latest messages appear at the bottom.
portal.chat_history_subtitle: Pick a chat to open it here, or start a new thread.
portal.footer_ai_notice: RAHJ AI can make mistakes. Double-check important answers.
portal.guidelines_page_intro: Short tips for getting the most from the assistant inside your ERP.
portal.guideline_erp_body: Use it for reports, filters, summaries, and workflow guidance across the app.
portal.guideline_private_body: The assistant is a session workspace for you — not a public chat feed.
portal.guideline_fresh_body: Use New chat or Clear chat when you want a different context.
portal.privacy_page_body: Your assistant tools stay in the ERP workspace and are designed for internal use.
portal.privacy_page_extra: When live features are enabled, answers respect your company, location, and permissions — the same rules as the rest of the system.
